description: A third-party auditor needs access to our SIEM for a compliance review, but they must only see successful logins to protect sensitive data. Using the Splunk instance at http://localhost:8000 (admin/SplunkAdmin1!), create a role named 'compliance_auditor' that inherits from the 'user' role. Restrict this role's access exclusively to the 'security_logs' index (as both the only allowed and default index) and apply a search filter that limits results to events containing the keyword 'Accepted'. Create a user 'auditor_joe' (password: 'Auditor123!') assigned only to the 'compliance_auditor' role, ensuring the account is ready for immediate authentication.
